channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Business & Economic Policy
channel.description: Strictly Zimbabwe business, finance, mining, investment and economic-policy stories — curated from foreign press and policy press. Each item ships with a branded headline card for social autolists.

item.title: Vic Falls heritage project empowers communities
item.description: Hazel Marimbizain Bulawayo ZIMBABWE and Zambia have launched a joint skills and entrepreneurship training programme around the Never Muboko.The programme, organised by... item.title: Harare, Abuja deepen mining ties

item.title: Yvonne Manwa bounces back as ZIFA CEO
item.description: The Zimbabwe Football Association (ZIFA) has appointed Yvonne Manwa as its new chief executive officer (CEO), marking her return to the association six months after her previous contract expired. Manwa, the former Ngezi Platinum Stars chief executive officer, previously served ZI #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News
